# Chapter 5: Tissue and organ engineering  (~110 pp)
- 5.1 The hierarchy: cells, tissues, organs, systems (12) · 5.2 Extracellular matrix (12) · 5.3 Tissue mechanics (15) · 5.4 Vascularisation as design constraint (15) · 5.5 Scaffolds and 3D-printed tissue (15) · 5.6 Stem cells, organoids (18) · 5.7 Failure section: rejection, vascularisation failure, tissue death (23)
